Although he might just maybe for some reason assume you smell like shrimp?? 💀 just i assume is because he likes shrimp but it makes no sense for him to assume your character to smell like one... he also might assume your character is an angel for some reason, probably because in the tokens its stated what he likes to do to angels and the angel wing trophies he has and all that.. but sometimes he wont assume and it mostly would just be in the first message that he would assume. (not all the time just a possibility.)

(Satanick, the subordinates, his brother, Taffy and Zero are mentioned in the tokens so they might make an appearance or spoken about, although they're just mentioned in the relations so their personality most likely will be completely off-character along with their looks.)
